intro: Paul AI GEO Analyzer helps you optimize your website for AI search and classic SEO by scoring your pages and providing actionable recommendations.

highlights.title: New Domain Overview
highlights.description: Easily view all analyzed pages of your website, sorted by those needing the most attention, so you can prioritize improvements.

highlights.title: Focused Recommendations
highlights.description: Get a clear, actionable instruction for the weakest area of your page, making it easier to understand what to fix.

highlights.title: User-Friendly Navigation
highlights.description: Switching pages now provides friendly guidance instead of error messages, enhancing your user experience.

highlights.title: One-Click Fix Snippets
highlights.description: Quickly copy code snippets for recommended fixes, turning diagnostics into easy implementations.

highlights.title: In-Page Issue Highlighting
highlights.description: Visually mark issues directly on your webpage, allowing you to see and address problems in real-time.

highlights.title: Comprehensive SEO Checks
highlights.description: Evaluate your pages with new SEO criteria, ensuring they are optimized for both AI and traditional search engines.

highlights.title: Enhanced Readability Scoring
highlights.description: Receive insights on how easy your content is to read, helping you create more accessible and engaging text.

highlights.title: International Support
highlights.description: The extension is now available in multiple languages, making it accessible to a wider audience.
